metadata.title: Translations | AdonERP
metadata.description: Join our global community of translators and make Adon ERP accessible to users in their native language. Help translate Adon ERP into 70+ languages and reach millions of users worldwide.

hero.title: Speak Every
hero.description: Join our global community of translators and make Adon ERP accessible to users in their native language — one string at a time.

testimonial.quote: The translation platform has been a joy to use. Clear context, helpful glossary, and a welcoming community — it feels like the project actually cares about quality.
testimonial.name: Carlos Mendez

whyTranslateSection.title: Make Adon ERP
whyTranslateSection.subtitle: speak your language
whyTranslateSection.description: Every translation goes directly into production. Your words help thousands of businesses around the world use Adon ERP with confidence.

benefits.title: Reach a global audience
benefits.description: Make Adon ERP accessible to users in their native language, opening doors to markets around the world.

benefits.title: Join a vibrant community
benefits.description: Collaborate with hundreds of passionate translators who share knowledge, best practices, and encouragement.

benefits.title: Earn contributor recognition
benefits.description: Qualified contributors receive official badges, community shoutouts, and invitations to translator events.

benefits.title: Improve user experience
benefits.description: High-quality translations directly impact how intuitive and delightful Adon ERP feels for non-English speakers.

howItWorksSection.title: From zero to
howItWorksSection.subtitle: published in four steps
howItWorksSection.description: Our guided workflow makes contributing translations simple for first-timers and efficient for seasoned editors alike.

steps.title: Pick your language
steps.description: Browse available language teams and find one that needs your expertise — or start a new one.

steps.title: Translate & review
steps.description: Use the web-based editor to work on strings, consult the glossary, and collaborate with fellow translators.

steps.title: Get it validated
steps.description: Community validators and language leads review merged strings before they ship to production.

steps.title: Ship to the world
steps.description: Once validated, your translations go live with every Adon ERP release — reaching millions of users.

rows.label: German
rows.text: Starten Sie noch heute Ihre kostenlose Testversion.

languagesSection.title: Every language
languagesSection.subtitle: matters
languagesSection.description: See how far each language team has come. Pick a language and contribute to bring it to 100%.

contributorsSection.title: Our top contributors
contributorsSection.description: These amazing community members have led their language teams to some of the highest completion rates across the platform.

testimonials.quote: Translating Adon ERP into Bengali has been one of the most rewarding open-source contributions I've ever made. The tooling makes it genuinely enjoyable.
testimonials.name: Rafi Hossain

testimonials.quote: The community is welcoming, the editor is excellent, and knowing our work is used daily by thousands makes every session feel worth it.
testimonials.name: Lena Kowalska

ctaSection.title: Your language is
ctaSection.subtitle: waiting to be heard
ctaSection.description: Join the Adon ERP translation community and help millions of users experience the platform in their own voice.
ctaSection.footerText: Free to join · No experience needed · Community-driven
